nasb.text: But Peter continued knocking; and when they had opened the door, they saw him and were amazed.

esv.text: But Peter continued knocking, and when they opened, they saw him and were amazed.

cnv.text: 彼得繼續敲門；他們打開了，一見是他，就非常驚訝。

ccb.text: 彼得不住地敲门。他们开门看见他，都大吃一惊！

csbs.text: 这时，彼得不停地敲门。他们就打开了门，看见是他，都十分惊讶。
